programme.title: Discovering Music
programme.desc: A look at the rise of rock opera pioneers The Who, from their formation at school in Acton, London, to their award-winning albums and sell out tours around the world.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: When quiet Roger Carson takes up gambling to escape from his domineering, wealthy old aunt, he falls for a pretty casino hostess whose sinister boss has plans to ruin the young man.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: The captain of an aircraft carrying 600 VIPs has to deal with a hijacker, but when the ransom is paid, he disappears - or does he?

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: At the height of her fame, Myra, a fashion model, is suddenly out of favour with her agencies and deserted by her boyfriend. Years later, she sees an opportunity to win him back.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A wife embarks on the path to disaster after she overhears a conversation which plants the seed of jealousy in her mind.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A retired thief is determined to get his moneys worth when he is persuaded to open a new kind of safe as a publicity stunt.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: A desperate forest ranger (Brian Keith) takes matters into his own hands when blackmailers threaten his adopted daughter.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: After being charged as a hit-and-run driver, a mystery writer (John Forsythe) elects to defend himself in court.

programme.title: Julie Andrews Forever
programme.desc: A glimpse into the career of the Oscar-winning Mary Poppins actress, and delving the behind the squeaky-clean image to reveal a much more torturous career.

programme.title: Les Miserables: The Staged Concert
programme.desc: A live broadcast of the musical phenomenon Les Miserables, filmed from Londons Gielgud Theatre in celebration of 35 years on the West End.

programme.title: In Restless Dreams: The Music of Paul Simon
programme.desc: Paul Simon follows him inside the studio making his new album Seven Psalms while looking back on his six-decade career with countless musical peaks from Sounds of Silence to Graceland.

programme.title: Spymasters: The Great Spy Writers
programme.sub-title: Alistair Maclean To John Le Carre
programme.desc: Cold War storytelling comes alive with Forsyth, MacLean and le Carre, with iconic scenes from `The Third Man and more.

programme.title: Under Capricorn
programme.desc: Poison and passion in 18th-century Australia. A young man is shocked to find that his genteel cousin, married to a tough ex-con who has found wealth in the penal colony, has taken to the bottle. His efforts to restore her spirits turn into more tender affections, but the actions of a malevolent housekeeper spark a chain of events that climax with a shocking revelation.

programme.title: Opry Live
programme.sub-title: Steven Curtis Chapman Induction, Lady A and Carly Pearce
programme.desc: Concerts from the Grand Ole Opry for country music fans.

programme.title: Isle Of Wight Festival 2025
programme.sub-title: Texas At Isle Of Wight Festival
programme.desc: Musicians perform at the Isle Of Wight Festival, one of the UKs oldest music festivals. The event is hosted at Seaclose Park, Newport, in June 2025 and headlined by Sting, Justin Timberlake, and Stereophonics.

programme.title: Whats New, Pussycat?
programme.desc: Comic look at 20th-century mans obsession with sex, in which a fashion editor with a penchant for gorgeous women visits a psychiatrist for help when he thinks he may actually be considering marriage. Unfortunately, the lecherous shrink needs treatment far more urgently than any of his patients.

programme.title: London Calling
programme.desc: With Pennie Smith, whose cover image for The Clashs `London Calling became one of rocks most famous photos.

programme.title: Classic Albums
programme.desc: The distinct talents of five musicians produced the fourth best selling album in music history. Their personal tragedies helped craft a timeless piece of pop. This is a behind-the-scenes look at the making of `Rumours.

programme.title: Classic Albums
programme.desc: The distinct talents of five musicians produced the fourth best selling album in music history. Their personal tragedies helped craft a timeless piece of pop. This is a behind-the-scenes look at the making of `Rumours.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade
programme.desc: The intrepid explorer Indiana Jones sets out to rescue his father, a medievalist who has vanished while searching for the Holy Grail. Following clues in the old mans notebook, Indy arrives in Venice, where he enlists the help of a beautiful academic, but they are not the only ones who are on the trail, and some sinister old enemies soon come out of the woodwork.

programme.title: Rampage
programme.desc: Primatologist Davis Okoye shares an unshakable bond with George, an extraordinarily intelligent silverback gorilla thats been in his care since birth. When a genetic experiment goes wrong, it causes George, a wolf and a reptile to grow to a monstrous size. As the mutated beasts embark on a path of destruction, Okoye teams up with a discredited genetic engineer and the military to secure an antidote and prevent a global catastrophe.

programme.title: Venom: Let There Be Carnage
programme.desc: Eddie Brock is still struggling to coexist with the shape-shifting extraterrestrial Venom. When deranged serial killer Cletus Kasady also becomes host to an alien symbiote, Brock and Venom must put aside their differences to stop his reign of terror.

programme.title: Jurassic World
programme.desc: Jurassic Park is now called Jurassic World, a fully functional dinosaur park that sees 20,000 visitors a year, the realisation of owner John Hammonds dreams. The scientists may have gone too far in creating some sort of hybrid dinosaur, which escapes and terrorises the park.

programme.title: Spider-Man 2
programme.desc: The comic book web-slinger returns for a blockbusting sequel. Crime-fighting has cost Peter Parker his best friend and his true love Mary Jane. However, just as he quits as Spider-Man, New York comes under threat from Dr Octopus, a metal-tentacled madman. Peter has no choice but to swing back into action.

programme.title: Rampage
programme.desc: Primatologist Davis Okoye shares an unshakable bond with George, an extraordinarily intelligent silverback gorilla thats been in his care since birth. When a genetic experiment goes wrong, it causes George, a wolf and a reptile to grow to a monstrous size. As the mutated beasts embark on a path of destruction, Okoye teams up with a discredited genetic engineer and the military to secure an antidote and prevent a global catastrophe.

programme.title: Fast and Furious 7
programme.desc: After defeating international terrorist Owen Shaw, Dominic Toretto, Brian OConner and the rest of the crew have separated to return to more normal lives. However, Deckard Shaw, Owens older brother, is thirsty for revenge. A slick government agent offers to help Dom and company take care of Shaw in exchange for their help in rescuing a kidnapped computer hacker who has developed a powerful surveillance program.

programme.title: Uncharted
programme.desc: Treasure hunter Victor Sullivan recruits Nathan Drake to help him recover a 500-year-old fortune. What starts out as a heist becomes a globe-trotting, white-knuckle race to reach the prize before the ruthless Santiago Moncada can get his hands on it.

programme.title: Spider-Man 3
programme.desc: Life is sweet for Peter Parker, MJ loves him, her career is taking off and Spidey-mania is sweeping New York. However, when an alien parasite bonds to his suit, its not long before the good times and Spidey turn bad. While his ugly ego is taking centre stage, MJ is dumped from her Broadway show, Harry remembers Spider-Mans role in his fathers death, and Peter is consumed by revenge.

programme.title: Fast and Furious 8
programme.desc: The globetrotting crew faces an unexpected challenge when a mysterious woman named Cipher forces Dom to betray them all. Now, they must unite to bring home the man who made them a family and stop her from unleashing chaos on a grand scale.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull
programme.desc: Professor Henry Jones is given a coded message during the Cold War which leads him to Peru in search of a legendary skull. Jones needs to deliver the skull to its rightful place, but Soviet agents who are trailing Jones have other plans which will endanger the West if the artefact falls into their hands.

programme.title: Love Hurts
programme.desc: Marvin is a Milwaukee realtor who receives a crimson envelope from a former partner-in-crime whom he left for dead. He now finds himself thrust back into a world of ruthless hit men and double-crosses that turn his open houses into deadly war zones.

programme.title: Love Hurts
programme.desc: Marvin is a Milwaukee realtor who receives a crimson envelope from a former partner-in-crime whom he left for dead. He now finds himself thrust back into a world of ruthless hit men and double-crosses that turn his open houses into deadly war zones.

programme.title: Long Gone Heroes
programme.desc: Gunner is a special forces soldier who returns to the field of battle to save his kidnapped niece in South America. He and his team soon discover that her disappearance is part of a corrupt private operation that hits way too close to home.

programme.title: Paws of Fury: The Legend of Hank
programme.desc: A down-on-his-luck hound finds himself in a town full of cats who need a hero to defend them from a ruthless villains evil plot. With help from a reluctant trainer, the underdog must assume the role of fearsome samurai and save the day.

programme.title: The LEGO Movie 2: The Second Part
programme.desc: The citizens of Bricksburg face a dangerous new threat when LEGO DUPLO invaders from outer space start to wreck everything in their path. The battle to defeat the enemy and restore harmony to the LEGO universe takes Emmet, Lucy, Batman and the rest of their friends to faraway, unexplored worlds that test their courage and creativity.

programme.title: Wallace and Gromit in The Curse of the Were-Rabbit
programme.desc: The village is being overrun by rabbits and Wallace has a plan to alter their minds so that they will leave the vegetable allotments alone. However, his plan goes awry and the rabbit problem escalates when the villagers discover a monstrous `were-rabbit destroying everything in its sights. Will Wallace and Gromit be able to solve the conundrum before the creature gets shot?

programme.title: The LEGO NINJAGO Movie
programme.desc: Master Wu, as wise-cracking as he is wise, leads a fierce team of secret ninja warriors to defeat the evil warlord Garmadon and save Ninjago City.

programme.title: Shrek 2
programme.desc: Ogre Shrek and his new wife Fiona are surprised to discover a letter from her parents, inviting them over for dinner. Fiona is eager to show off her new husband, but her parents dont yet know shes an ogre. Taking Donkey along, they set off for Far Far Away to visit them, but the trip is hampered by the jealousy of a wicked fairy godmother and her hired assassin, Puss in Boots.

programme.title: The Bad Guys 2
programme.desc: Reformed criminals Mr. Wolf, Mr. Snake, Mr. Piranha, Mr. Shark and Ms. Tarantula find themselves hijacked into a high-stakes heist thats masterminded by a new team of delinquents they never saw coming -- the Bad Girls.

programme.title: Antz
programme.desc: Visually exuberant tale about a neurotic ant who struggles to express his individuality in a colony of conformists. He attempts to break from his totalitarian society while at the same time trying to win the affection of the princess he loves.

programme.title: The Secret Life of Pets
programme.desc: A domesticated terrier and his unruly canine pal encounter a rebellious bunny and his gang of abandoned pets.

programme.title: Rock Dog 3: Battle the Beat
programme.desc: Hoping to inspire a new generation of rock stars, Bodi joins a musical competition show and becomes an overnight TV personality sensation.

programme.title: Monster Family
programme.desc: Draculas spell turns a woman and her loved ones into a vampire, a mummy, a werewolf and Frankensteins monster.

programme.title: Monster Family 2
programme.desc: Baba Yaga and Renfield are captured by a monster hunter so the Wishbone family once again transform into a vampire Frankensteins monster a mummy and a werewolf in a bid to free them.

programme.title: Scary Girl
programme.desc: To save her father from a dangerous scientist in a world shrouded in darkness, and prevent her planets destruction, a young girl overcomes her fears to travel to a mysterious city of light.

programme.title: Rebellious
programme.desc: A headstrong princess is stolen by an evil sorcerer, and her scholarly fiance must use his wits in an epic quest to find her while she boldly challenges her captors and plots a daring escape.

programme.title: Rebellious
programme.desc: A headstrong princess is stolen by an evil sorcerer, and her scholarly fiance must use his wits in an epic quest to find her while she boldly challenges her captors and plots a daring escape.

programme.title: Fox and Hare Save the Forest
programme.desc: One day, Fox and Hare discover that Owl has disappeared. They go looking for him in the forest with all their friends and discover a big lake that wasnt there before. It is the beginning of an exciting and funny adventure.

programme.title: The Death of Stalin
programme.desc: When dictator Joseph Stalin dies, his parasitic cronies square off in a frantic power struggle to become the next Soviet leader. As they bumble, brawl and back-stab their way to the top, the question remains -- just who is running the government?

programme.title: The Hangover Part III
programme.desc: Phil, Stu and Doug take Alan on a road trip to help him through a personal crisis.

programme.title: Am I OK?
programme.desc: When Lucy realises that shes never been attracted to men, her lifelong friend Jane helps her navigate coming out in her 30s.

programme.title: The Golden Child
programme.desc: A social worker who specialises in missing children is recruited to rescue a mystical Tibetan child from evil forces.

programme.title: Mean Girls
programme.desc: After 15 years in African bush country, Cady knows all about herd instincts, but nothing has prepared her for high school. She joins a popular but cruelly manipulative crowd of girls known as the `Plastics and secretly mocks them, but the fun stops when one betrays her and steals the boy she fancies.

programme.title: Two Weeks Notice
programme.desc: An ambitious law graduate decides to leave her job as she feels her skills are not appreciated by her boss, who basically treats her like his PA. However, he wont let her go that easily.

programme.title: Finding Your Feet
programme.desc: A middle-class snob on the eve of retirement takes refuge with her bohemian sister after she discovers her husband is having an affair with her best friend.

programme.title: The Naked Gun
programme.desc: Following in the footsteps of his bumbling father, Detective Frank Drebin Jr. must solve a murder case to prevent Police Squad from shutting down.

programme.title: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
programme.desc: Andie Anderson writes an advice column for a fashionable magazine and agrees to demonstrate how easy it is to attract then alienate a man in just ten days. She chooses Benjamin Barry, little knowing hes an advertising executive whose job rests on proving he understands women so well that he can make one fall for him in two weeks.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: Mad About the Boy
programme.desc: After jumping back into the dating pool, single mother Bridget Jones finds herself caught between a younger man and her sons science teacher.

programme.title: Miss Congeniality 2: Armed and Fabulous
programme.desc: FBI agent Gracie is given another makeover to become the face of the Bureau, prior to embarking on a promotional tour. When two of her friends are kidnapped - Miss USA and a beauty pageant director - she decides to investigate on her own, in defiance of orders to the contrary.

programme.title: Hope Springs
programme.desc: A woman drags her skeptical husband to a renowned counsellors marriage retreat to try to put the spark back in their relationship.

programme.title: The Natural
programme.desc: The almost mythical ability of a middle-aged baseball player rockets a major-league team toward the 1939 pennant.

programme.title: The Natural
programme.desc: The almost mythical ability of a middle-aged baseball player rockets a major-league team toward the 1939 pennant.

programme.title: Zoolander
programme.desc: A disgraced male model becomes the unwitting fall guy in an evil designers plot to assassinate a world leader.

programme.title: Amadeus
programme.desc: Once the highly regarded composer to the Viennese Court, Salieri is now an old man, unknown and confined to an asylum. After a suicide attempt he recounts his story to a young cleric, going back 30 years to his heyday at the court of Emperor Joseph II, where he first met the young Mozart. Despite Salieris Machiavellian attempts to frustrate Mozarts progress, the great young composer attracts the favour of the Emperor.

programme.title: Girl You Know Its True
programme.desc: Grammy Award-winning music act Milli Vanilli become the first act to have their prize stripped from them after they are exposed as a fake enterprise with the singers lip-syncing to pre-recorded tracks.

programme.title: Turtles All the Way Down
programme.desc: When a 16-year-old struggling with obsessive-compulsive disorder reconnects with her childhood crush, she faces the potential of finding love and happiness despite her mental condition.

programme.title: Lee
programme.desc: The story of photographer Elizabeth `Lee Miller, a fashion model who became an acclaimed war correspondent for Vogue magazine during World War II.

programme.title: About a Boy
programme.desc: Parallel coming-of-age stories of a layabout `serial nice guy living a posh, carefree lifestyle off his deceased fathers fortune, and a bright but awkward youth whos tired of his mothers depressed, boyfriend-less state. Their paths collide when the boy fabricates a two-year-old son and joins a group called S.P.A.T. (Single Parents Alone Together).

programme.title: Jerry Maguire
programme.desc: A sports agent who makes the mistake of saying what he believes, finds himself sacked and abandoned by all his clients apart from small time footballer Rod Tidwell. Maguires personal life starts to fall apart as hes torn between love and money in Cameron Crowes metaphor on Americans need for success and money.

programme.title: About Time
programme.desc: After discovering that he can travel through time, a young man uses his ability to win the woman of his dreams and save his friend from professional disaster.

programme.title: It Ends With Us
programme.desc: Lily Bloom falls for a charming neurosurgeon after she moves to Boston to chase her dream of opening her own business. However, when her first love suddenly reenters her life, her relationship gets upended, leaving her with an impossible choice.

programme.title: An Officer and a Gentleman
programme.desc: At a tough training school for American navy pilots, one of the new intake falls foul of the hard-as-nails drill sergeant, but takes it on the chin, and finds the additional strength to help a fellow student who is feeling the pressure.

programme.title: The Brutalist
programme.desc: Escaping postwar Europe, a visionary architect comes to America to rebuild his life, his career, and his marriage. On his own in a strange new country, he settles in Pennsylvania, where a wealthy and prominent industrialist recognises his talent.

programme.title: The Room Next Door
programme.desc: Ingrid and Martha became close friends while working together at the same magazine. After years of being out of touch, they meet again in an extreme but strangely sweet situation.

programme.title: Babylon
programme.desc: The story of Blue, a young man of Jamaican descent living in Brixton in 1980, as he hangs out with his friends, fronts a dub sound system, loses his job, struggles with family problems and has his friendships tested by racism.

programme.title: Babylon
programme.desc: The story of Blue, a young man of Jamaican descent living in Brixton in 1980, as he hangs out with his friends, fronts a dub sound system, loses his job, struggles with family problems and has his friendships tested by racism.

programme.title: Antz
programme.desc: Visually exuberant tale about a neurotic ant who struggles to express his individuality in a colony of conformists. He attempts to break from his totalitarian society while at the same time trying to win the affection of the princess he loves.

programme.title: The Witches
programme.desc: Creepy fairy tale following the fortunes of a young orphan who becomes embroiled in a supernatural adventure. Brought up on his kindly grandmothers scary stories about witches, he stumbles on a real coven while on holiday. Overhearing their plans to capture all the children in Britain, he sets out to stop them, remaining undeterred throughout - even when he has been turned into a mouse.

programme.title: The Bad Guys 2
programme.desc: Reformed criminals Mr. Wolf, Mr. Snake, Mr. Piranha, Mr. Shark and Ms. Tarantula find themselves hijacked into a high-stakes heist thats masterminded by a new team of delinquents they never saw coming -- the Bad Girls.

programme.title: Paddington in Peru
programme.desc: Paddington and his adopted family, the Browns, decide to visit his aunt Lucy in Peru, but circumstances lead them towards misadventures in the Amazon rainforest and mountains of Peru.

programme.title: Happy Feet
programme.desc: Son of Memphis and Norma, little sweet penguin Mumble has a big problem: he cant sing a single note. In a world where everyone needs a heart song to attract a soul mate, Mumble feels he doesnt belong there. Our hero Mumble is the worst singer in the world, but he can tap dance brilliantly.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.desc: Peter Rabbit and his three sisters -- Flopsy, Mopsy and Cotton-Tail -- enjoy spending their days in Mr. McGregors vegetable garden. When one of McGregors relatives suddenly moves in, hes less than thrilled to discover a family of rabbits in his new home. A battle of wills soon breaks out as the new owner hatches scheme after scheme to get rid of Peter -- a resourceful rabbit who proves to be a worthy and wily opponent.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Out of the Shadows
programme.desc: The turtles spring into action to battle Shredder, mad scientist Baxter Stockman, Bebop, Rocksteady and the notorious Krang.

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Desolation of Smaug
Antz
programme.desc: Visually exuberant tale about a neurotic ant who struggles to express his individuality in a colony of conformists. He attempts to break from his totalitarian society while at the same time trying to win the affection of the princess he loves.

programme.title: E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial
programme.desc: Heartwarming tale in which a ten-year-old boy befriends and shelters a gentle alien creature who has been stranded on Earth. When the authorities are alerted to this unusual house guest, the boy tries to help the creature return home before menacing government agents close in. The film won three Academy Awards for music, sound and special effects.

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Battle of the Five Armies
programme.desc: After the dwarves find and awaken Smaug the dragon, a battle arises to gain control of Erebor and the vast treasure inside. Meanwhile, Bilbo Baggins is in possession of a mysterious and magical ring.

programme.title: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Following the adventures of Yang who is a successor in to a long line of Avatars. He has to put aside his childhood in order to stop he Fire Nation from enslaving the Water, Earth and Air nations.

programme.title: Spy Kids
programme.desc: Two siblings set out on a mission to rescue their ex-spy parents. Summoned back to work from their uneventful lives, the adults run into trouble while on duty. When the children are called upon to help them, they find out about their parents former identities while at the same time developing a greater appreciation for each other.

programme.title: Spy Kids 2: The Island of Lost Dreams
programme.desc: The sequel in which the globetrotting sibling duo attempt to reclaim the powerful Transmooker device from the clutches of a mad scientist. Their quest leads them to his tropical island hideaway, which he shares with an assortment of mutant creatures.

programme.title: Spy Kids 2: The Island of Lost Dreams
programme.desc: The sequel in which the globetrotting sibling duo attempt to reclaim the powerful Transmooker device from the clutches of a mad scientist. Their quest leads them to his tropical island hideaway, which he shares with an assortment of mutant creatures.

programme.title: The First Wives Club
programme.desc: When Brenda Cushman, Elise Elliot and Annie Paradis are reunited at the funeral of a college friend, they discover they have another thing in common: theyve all been dumped by their husbands, Morty, Bill and Aaron, for a younger model. Vowing revenge, they decide to hit them where it hurts most: the pocket. Using help and their various skills, they begin to pick them off one by on.

programme.title: Billy Madison
programme.desc: Billy is the son of hotel chain magnate Brian Madison and expects to inherit the family fortune, but hes shocked when his father stipulates he wont unless he passes 12th grade in just 24 weeks. It will be tough, since he never passed 1st grade. Determined to prove his father wrong, Billy enrols at school.

programme.title: The Man With Two Brains
programme.desc: Zany horror spoof about a brilliant brain surgeon who falls in love with a female brain stored in a jar. The brain is part of an impressive collection held by a colleague in Austria and, upon learning of his wifes infidelity, the surgeon allows himself to be charmed. Communicating telepathically with one of the specimens in the laboratory, he falls in love - but needs a body to put it in.

programme.title: Blazing Saddles
programme.desc: Irreverent spoof about a black sheriff hired by a crooked speculator to drive citizens out of an all-white town which lies in the path of a railroad. The townspeople turn on the inexperienced sheriff, and he is forced to turn to a convict, once the fastest gun in the West, for help.

programme.title: In and Out
programme.desc: The entire town is watching with bated breath as one of their own is up for an Oscar. They get more than they bargain for when he outs his high-school English teacher, who then has to prove to everyone, especially his fiancee, that hes straight. The press turn up and one reporter in particular is making life very difficult.

programme.title: Tootsie
programme.desc: An out-of-work actor dresses in drag for an audition, only to land the female lead in a TV soap. When he becomes the most popular character on the show, he feels compelled to carry the persona into his everyday life. While bringing him phenomenal success as an `actress, life as a woman also has its problems - especially when he falls for an actress with whom he works.

programme.title: Ace Ventura: Pet Detective
programme.desc: Tale about an unconventional sleuths attempts to find a football teams stolen mascot dolphin. The Miami Dolphins are aghast when their beloved Snowflake is abducted one week before the all-important Super Bowl, so they call in Ace Ventura, a private eye who uses unorthodox methods to retrieve missing animals.

programme.title: Ace Ventura: When Nature Calls
programme.desc: Sequel about the zany private detective who specialises in locating missing pets. Ace Ventura travels to Africa to search for a kidnapped sacred albino bat, which reputedly has the power to restore peace between two warring tribes.

programme.title: Big Daddy
programme.desc: A thirtysomething slacker attempts to inject some stability into his life by adopting an impressionable five-year-old.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop
programme.desc: A fast-talking cop trails his best friends killer from the alleys of Detroit to the posh galleries of Beverly Hills.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop II
programme.desc: The hard-nosed Detroit cop from the original film returns to Los Angeles to help solve another case. This time he must direct his efforts towards unraveling the Alphabet Crimes, a series of robberies committed by leather-jacketed punks. The investigation puts him on the trail of an illegal arms dealer and his hit lady.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop III
programme.desc: Axel Foley and his Beverly Hills buddies investigate criminal activities at a Southern California amusement park.

programme.title: Big Daddy
programme.desc: A thirtysomething slacker attempts to inject some stability into his life by adopting an impressionable five-year-old.

programme.title: Risky Business
programme.desc: A normally well-behaved teenager goes wild while his parents are out of town. In charge at his parents smart house, the 17-year-old sees the chance to make a fast buck when the prostitute, on the run from a scary pimp, appears at his door. He takes her in, and, following his schools entrepreneurial teachings, lets her turn the house into a brothel.

programme.title: The Man With Two Brains

programme.title: The Cinema List: Bingeable
programme.desc: On the Cinema List, join us as we explore our favourite franchises to get cosy with, from Transformers to Bad Boys 2. Snuggle down on the sofa and take your pick.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop III
programme.desc: Axel Foley and his Beverly Hills buddies investigate criminal activities at a Southern California amusement park.

programme.title: The LEGO Movie
programme.desc: An ordinary LEGO figurine, thought to be the key to saving the world, is accompanied by a fellowship of strangers embarking on a quest to vanquish a tyrant bent on a terrible deed.

programme.title: The LEGO NINJAGO Movie
programme.desc: Master Wu, as wise-cracking as he is wise, leads a fierce team of secret ninja warriors to defeat the evil warlord Garmadon and save Ninjago City.

programme.title: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: Supernatural comedy about three New York parapsychology professors who decide to set up a ghost-catching agency. Soon a storm of malevolent spirits threatens to destroy the city, and the mysterious contents of a womans fridge suggest a paranormal Armageddon.

programme.title: Ghostbusters II
programme.desc: The phantom-fighters return to the streets of New York when they come to the aid of a woman who fears that her baby is the target of ghostly forces. Four years after Dr Peter Venkman broke up with Dana Barrett, she appeals for help to save her son when an arch-demon trapped in an oil painting wants to take over his body. The old team reunite and trace the source of the trouble to a sinister underground river of slime.

programme.title: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: Armed with proton packs and plenty of attitude, four women prepare for an epic battle as mischievous ghosts start to wreak havoc in New York.

programme.title: The Hangover
programme.desc: A crazy Las Vegas bachelor party turns into a race against time when three hung-over groomsmen awaken after a night of drunken debauchery to find that the groom has gone missing, and attempt to get him to the alter in time for his wedding.

programme.title: The Hangover Part II
programme.desc: A group of friends go to Thailand for a quiet and restrained stag party, but are dismayed to wake up in a mysterious hotel room, with a man missing and no memory of the night before. Of course, Alan manages to get himself in with the crowd.

programme.title: The Hangover Part III
programme.desc: Phil, Stu and Doug take Alan on a road trip to help him through a personal crisis.

programme.title: Dumb and Dumber
programme.desc: A pair of idiotic friends set off on a madcap journey to return a briefcase to its owner. However, they are blissfully unaware that the case contains a large amount of ransom money for the owners kidnapped husband. Their trip is soon fraught with disaster, especially when the kidnappers begin to pursue them across the country with the aim of grabbing the cash.

programme.title: Dumb and Dumberer: When Harry Met Lloyd
programme.desc: A grant-greedy principal puts two clueless teens in a bogus class for students with special needs.

programme.title: Miss Congeniality
programme.desc: An uncouth FBI agent goes undercover in the Miss United States beauty pageant as a contestant to flush out a terrorist who plans to bomb the event. The hard-nosed cop, who prides herself on her toughness, must discard her trainers and feminise her behaviour if she is to avoid blowing her cover.

programme.title: Coyotes
programme.desc: Members of a family find themselves in a desperate fight for survival when a pack of coyotes swarms their Hollywood Hills home.

programme.title: Flavia
programme.desc: Flavia de Luce, an 11-year-old amateur sleuth, investigates a murder at her familys manor house when her father falls under suspicion. Starring Martin Freeman and Jonathan Pryce. (2026)

programme.title: Blue Moon
programme.desc: In 1943 lyricist Lorenz Hart confronts his shattered self-confidence in a bar as his former collaborator, Richard Rodgers, celebrates the opening night of his groundbreaking hit musical "Oklahoma!"

programme.title: One Battle After Another
programme.desc: Bob is a washed-up revolutionary who lives in a state of paranoia, surviving off-grid with his daughter, Willa. When his nemesis resurfaces and Willa goes missing, the former radical scrambles to find her while battling the consequences of his past.

programme.desc: The source of the Mekong River is high up in the Tibetan plateau, from there it flows into Yunnan Province, China, where our journey begins. Yunnan occupies less than four percent of Chinas land but it is home to over half of its birds and mammals.

programme.desc: Actors and canal lovers Timothy West and Prunella Scales go in search of Londons lost route to the sea. They navigate from the Thames at Teddington, through the Surrey and Sussex countryside, to Littlehampton on the south coast.

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Timothy West and Prunella Scales travel from Birmingham to Braunston in Northamptonshire, for a festival of vintage canal boats. The challenging journey involves dozens of locks and a ghostly tunnel.

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Timothy West and Prunella Scales head to Ireland. In perhaps their most dramatically beautiful voyage, they trace the story of the canal that links the south to the north: the Shannon Erne Waterway, also known as the Peace Canal.

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Timothy West and Prunella Scales attempt one of the longest and most beautiful canal journeys in the world, travelling 350 miles, across Sweden. The first leg of their voyage begins in Gothenburg, where they link up with the historic Gota Canal.

programme.title: The Life of Mammals
programme.desc: David Attenborough looks at carnivores, from arctic foxes who store up food for the winter, through pack-hunting wolves, to big cats. Using infrared, he trails a lone leopard, and seeks out the biggest cat of all, the Siberian tiger.

programme.title: The Life of Mammals
programme.desc: Omnivores resourcefulness enables them to take advantage of gluts of certain kinds of foods, and helps them to survive. Featuring raccoons with their sensitive hands, and bears that gorge while the salmon are running up river, before hibernating through winter.

programme.title: The Life of Mammals
programme.desc: In Florida, David swims for the first time with manatees - gentle, giant grazing mammals. Off the coast of California, he dons a wet suit and flippers to swim with sea otters, and, in a tiny boat, he encounters the biggest mammal of all, a blue whale.

programme.title: The Life of Mammals
programme.desc: We study tree dwellers - mammals which have adapted to a life at height. A third of the worlds surface is still covered by forest of some sort. Animals such as the hyrax, tamanduas and flying squirrel have developed different tactics with which to exploit this environment.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: When the vicar and Mrs Dingle decide to reopen the youth club, they enlist Terrys help to assemble a ping-pong table. The instructions should be idiot-proof, but whoever wrote them had not taken Terry into account.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: One-upmanship is the name of the game when Terry discovers that a junior member of the office staff has a satellite dish.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: When the landlord of the local pub is advised to take a rest by his doctor, Terry and June offer to run the place in his absence. However, their good deed looks set to backfire when Sir Dennis threatens to sack anyone found guilty of moonlighting.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: Terry loves to be the centre of attention, but when he discovers he bears an uncanny resemblance to a criminal, he wishes the spotlight would focus on someone else.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: Terry experiences pangs of jealousy when June arranges to meet a childhood sweetheart. Misunderstandings and advice from Sir Dennis compound the situation.

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses...
programme.desc: Del arms himself with red braces and yuppy sorts and goes forth to do battle. Unfortunately, his flirtation with the yuppie world doesnt seem to be as successful as Rodneys flirtation with the lovely Cassandra.

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses...
programme.desc: Del Boy, complete with yuppie trimmings, Mercedes key ring, filofax and aluminium briefcase, gets involved in a shady business deal that blows up in his face.

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses...
programme.desc: Del attempts to break into the big time when he sets up a consortium to buy 250 gold chains from a jewellery dealer at a knockdown price. Unfortunately, Del has not anticipated the dealer having a heart attack over lunch.

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses...
programme.desc: The loveable Peckham boys go overseas after Del Boy enters one of Rodneys paintings in a competition and wins a weeks holiday in Mallorca for three, but when Del, Rodney and Cassandra arrive at the resort, Rodney realises there is a slight catch to Dels free holidaying plans.

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses...
programme.desc: Del decides to resolve a cash-flow crisis by charging people to attend seances conducted by Uncle Alberts psychic girlfriend. However, the enterprise somehow ends in hospital.

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses...
programme.desc: Rodney and Cassandra become officially engaged. However, Rodney thinks he has failed his computer science exam, and he has to find the cash for a deposit on a flat. Big brother Del tries to help him by selling a haul of mobile phones.

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses...
programme.desc: Dels application for a home improvement grant has been turned down by the local council, but at least he should be able to get tickets for the publicans party at the Nags Head. Meanwhile, Cassandra discovers something big.

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lees former flatmate Kate has moved back to America, so Tim decides to sell the flat. programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: When a historical documentary team comes to film at Button House, Alison and the ghosts are shocked to discover that the assassination plot they are investigating involved one of their own. Meanwhile, Mike, always on the lookout for free publicity, begs Alison to accept the offer of a television interview about the old house. The only hitch is that Alison is terrified of speaking on camera. Luckily, Thomas is there to coach her in the art of speechmaking.

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: A mysterious visitor arrives at Button House with a revelation that leaves Alison reeling. Thomas is equally confused by his feelings for this strange visitor, while Lady Button and Julian warn of sinister motives, and Kitty is as territorial as ever over her surrogate sister Alison. Mike has an epiphany on his first day at a new job, which triggers Julian to remember his first day as a ghost.

programme.title: Toast of London
programme.desc: After losing £20,000 to Andrew Lloyd Webber in a celebrity poker game, Toast finds himself being hunted by musical superstar and part-time theatre-land enforcer, Michael Ball. Needing cash, a desperate Toast agrees to dub some gay art house porn.

programme.title: Wagspiracy: Vardy v Rooney
programme.desc: In 2019, Wagatha Christie gripped Britain as Coleen Rooney accused Rebekah Vardy of leaking stories about her to the tabloid press. Despite huge media attention on this social media scandal, and a trial that ended up in the high-court in the summer of 2022, with Rooney emerging victorious, the inside story of how and why this extraordinary moment in British culture came to pass, has never fully been told - until now.

programme.desc: Fitzpatrick Referrals is used to dealing with emergencies, but when a young cockapoo called Orla gets hit by a lawn mower, Professor Noel Fitzpatrick fears the worst. Noels challenge is to save as much of the leg as possible.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: Homeowners across Britain try to complete do-it-yourself home projects on their own. But sometimes, they need help finishing the work. Thats where presenter Nick Knowles and his team of designers and builders step in. They help homeowners complete their DIY projects gone awry.

programme.title: World at War

programme.title: World at War
programme.desc: Hitler turns his tanks towards Russia. After a succession of devastating victories, the Germans delay fatally, and the fierce Russian winter takes a grip.

programme.title: World at War
programme.desc: The Japanese, at war on the Chinese mainland since 1931, hope for quick victories over the British and the Dutch, but 7 December 1941 brings the infamous attack on Pearl Harbor, and the start of an all-conquering sweep through Southeast Asia culminating in the taking of Singapore.

programme.title: World at War
programme.desc: America entered conflict after the Japanese attack on Pearl Harbor, but the conflict in Europe and the conflict in the Pacific were two separate wars. Many Americans would have been content to forget about Hitler and Europe. Despite opposition from congress President Roosevelt, however, was committed to fighting Hitler. Eventually Hitler declared war on America, thus relieving Roosevelt of a difficult decision.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: On the last leg of his journey across England, Robbie crosses an epic aqueduct near Stratford-upon-Avon and gets stuck in a lock in central Birmingham.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Narrowboater Robbie Cumming begins his 170-mile journey across the north of England and soon runs into difficulty when he encounters a propeller problem in Wigan and runs aground in Blackburn. Nevertheless, he pushes on to navigate a true wonder of the waterways, the Burnley Embankment.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Narrowboater and film-maker Robbie Cumming crosses the Pennines on the picturesque Leeds and Liverpool Canal, and lends a hand to hire boaters in Gargrave, North Yorkshire. He also encounters Bingley Five Rise Locks, a wonder of the inland waterways.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Jump on board with narrowboater Robbie Cumming as he explores the Victorian village of Saltaire on the Leeds and Liverpool Canal, moors up in Leeds and goes in search of an abandoned waterway on the Aire and Calder Navigation.

programme.title: Britains Ancient Capital: Secrets of Orkney
programme.desc: Chris Packham uncovers the secrets revealed by the DNA of Orkneys unique vole, and Neil Oliver explores Orkneys tombs and monuments. Meanwhile Dr Shini Somara experiments to discover how the Orcadians could have moved giant blocks of stone over rough ground, and Andy Torbet climbs Orkneys most challenging sea-stack to unlock the story of Orkneys unusual geology.

programme.title: Cornwall with Simon Reeve

programme.title: World at War
programme.desc: After Hitlers initial territorial gains in Russia, the relentless advance of the Wehrmacht is decisively stopped at Stalingrad. For the first time in the war, the Nazis suffer heavy losses in what will later be regarded as one of the decisive turning points of the conflict.

programme.title: True Evil: Making of a Nazi
programme.desc: Heinrich Himmler, the book-loving loner whose strange mystical beliefs drive him to carry out the most shocking act of genocide in human history.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team visit the county of Moray in the north of Scotland. Brodie Castle has been home to the Brodie clan for some 800 years, and Fiona discovers the areas ancient history in the form of the Rodney carving, dating from the 8th century, when the area was inhabited by the Celtic-speaking Picts. The Picts were known for their intricate carvings of people and standing stones like the Celtic cross that now stands proud in Brodie Castles grounds.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Across Britain, specialists in antiques and fine arts appraise items brought in by local residents, whether they are collectors looking to turn trash into treasure or ordinary folks hoping Grandmas old painting might now fund the kids education.

programme.desc: Its the pursuit of cute as the team re-commission a 1991 Nissan Figaro.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash: Restoring Classics

programme.title: Australia with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon travels from Darwin in Australias Northern Territory or `Top End, across to the remote Cape York Peninsula, and on to the Great Barrier Reef. Simon sets off from Kakadu, the largest national park in the world, where the wildlife is under threat from the march of millions of poisonous cane toads. He joins a team of toad-busters catching the amphibian invaders.

programme.title: Great Australian Railway Journeys
programme.sub-title: Port Augusta to Darwin: The Ghan
programme.desc: Michael Portillo ventures down under to experience one of the worlds greatest rail journeys aboard the legendary Ghan Railway. His 1913 Bradshaws Guide tells him `a transcontinental railway is being constructed and he traces its route from the southern harbour of Port Augusta to the port of Darwin on the north coast.

programme.title: Incredible Journeys with Simon Reeve

programme.desc: The homes of Britain are stacked with unwanted possessions. Henry Cole and Simon OBrien are here to turn them into hard cash for their owners. This episodes items include a clay pigeon trap, search light and Peugeot 205.

programme.title: American Historys Biggest Fibs with Lucy Worsley
programme.desc: Lucy Worsley reveals the historic myths and deceptions told following the United States emergence as a superpower after the Second World War. The 1950s and early 1960s in America are often remembered as a golden era of abundance, harmony and the American dream made real. This film reveals that to be a carefully constructed illusion.

programme.title: Tippu
programme.desc: Satya, a student, is smitten by Vaishnavi, who belongs to another college. He joins her college hoping to court her, but a fearsome gangster, Keshu Bhai, is attracted to Vaishnavi too.

programme.title: Traffic
programme.desc: In Pune, Riya needs an urgent heart transplant. Elsewhere in Mumbai, Rehan loses his life. His parents agree to donate his heart to her. It is only by road that they can transport the organ.

programme.title: Deewana
programme.desc: A famous pop singer falls in love with one of his fans. Unfortunately, his jealous family are plotting to kill him.

programme.title: What the Fish
programme.desc: A grumpy old woman travels abroad and puts her niece in charge of her house in Delhi, only to return to utter chaos and mess.

programme.title: Golmaal Returns
programme.desc: Obsessed with day-time TV soaps, Ekta Santoshi starts suspecting her husband, Gopal, of having an affair with an unknown woman. Not satisfied with his explanations, she decides to investigate.

programme.title: Kabhi Khushi Kabhie Gham ...
programme.desc: When Rahul falls in love with a lower class girl, his father disowns him. Rahul and his wife move to London, and are met years later by Rahuls brother, who is determined to reunite the family.

programme.title: Son of Sardaar 2
programme.desc: Jassi returns home to reconcile with his wife but gets entangled in a mob conflict and chaotic Sikh wedding. He battles to save hostages and his marriage amidst cultural turmoil.

programme.title: Chak De India
programme.desc: After failing to score the winning goal, Kabir Khan, Captain of the Mens Hockey Team is blamed for the teams loss and fired. Years later he is given a chance to salvage his reputation, when he is offered the position as coach of the Womens Hockey Team.

programme.title: Aiyaary
programme.desc: After an army mentor and his protege have a fallout, the protege goes rogue and threatens to bring down the government. So, the mentor is forced to go after him.

programme.title: Hero No. 1

programme.title: Singh Is King

programme.title: Hum Saath Saath Hain
programme.desc: Ramkishen and his wife Mamta have three sons. Prem and Vinod have sweethearts in Preeti and Vivek marries Sangeeta. Since Vivek is Mamtas step-son, she plots to alienate him, but will she succeed?

programme.title: Bhabiji Ghar Par Hain - Fun on the Run
Auron Mein Kahan Dum Tha
programme.desc: Krishna and Vasudha fledgling relationship is interrupted when Krishna gets involved in a murder. After spending 23 years in prison, Krishna is released, leading to one final meeting with Vasudha.

programme.title: Khatarnak
